mapper.sql: species_id, fiscal_year, pairing_id, male_parent_id, female_parent_id, pairing_date, note
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM pairing ORDER BY species_id, fiscal_year DESC, pairing_id
SELECT pairing_id FROM pairing WHERE species_id = #{speciesId} AND fiscal_year = #{fiscalYear}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pairing ( species_id, fiscal_year, pairing_id, male_parent_id, female_parent_id, pairing_date, note ) VALUES ( #{speciesId}, #{fiscalYear}, #{pairingId}, #{maleParentId}, #{femaleParentId}, #{pairingDate}, #{note} )
